ideas.research_question: Can federated learning models be trained to recognize and respond to privacy attacks while maintaining model performance?
ideas.proposed_method: Developing a adversarial training framework for federated learning models
ideas.dataset: MNIST dataset with added noise to simulate real-world privacy attacks
ideas.evaluation_metric: Model accuracy and F1-score on unseen data

ideas.research_question: How does differential privacy impact the convergence rate of federated learning models in non-IID settings?
ideas.proposed_method: Implementing and analyzing the effects of differential privacy on federated learning models using non-IID datasets
ideas.dataset: CIFAR-10 dataset partitioned into non-IID subsets
ideas.evaluation_metric: Convergence rate measured by test accuracy over communication rounds

ideas.research_question: Can invertible neural networks be used to improve the privacy of federated learning models by enabling secure data sharing?
ideas.proposed_method: Designing and testing invertible neural networks for federated learning with secure data sharing
ideas.dataset: FEMNIST dataset for federated image classification
ideas.evaluation_metric: Reconstruction error of shared data and model performance on target task
